name: Holder-Only Alpha Room Agent
description: Mocks holder-gated alpha room access now, with future wallet ownership proof support before live holder gating.
degenPitch: Holder room now in mock, ownership proof later when you are ready.
whatItDoes: Runs holder-only access design in mock mode first.
Can combine receipt verification with future wallet ownership proof.
Keeps private keys out of the bot and backend.
feeBehavior: Access fees are visible and receipt-bound; wallet ownership proof is a separate later gate.
cursorPrompt: Build a Holder-Only Alpha Room Agent using DNA x402 in mock mode first. Verify receipts for access, design future wallet ownership proof, and never request private keys.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Holder-Only Alpha Room Agent using DNA x402 in mock mode first. Verify receipts for access, design future wallet ownership proof, and never request private keys.
exampleFlow: Bot explains holder proof is mock mode
Bot quotes paid access if enabled
receiptProofBehavior: Future ownership proof must be wallet-signed client-side.
